businessSummary.oneLiner: Southeast Asia's largest internet platform — Shopee (e-commerce), SeaMoney (fintech), Garena (gaming) triple-pillar ecosystem
businessSummary.description: Sea Limited is a consumer internet company operating across Southeast Asia, Latin America, and globally. Runs Shopee (e-commerce), SeaMoney (digital finance), Garena (gaming). FY2025 revenue $22.94B (+36.4% YoY), net income $1.58B (+255%). Friday close $86.00 (+0.99%). Simply Wall St: YTD -32%, 30-day -17.8%. RSI 31 oversold. Near 52-week low $77. Barclays cut target $226→$120 (Buy maintained), TD Cowen $138→$100. Logistics cost +43% surge but fulfillment 2x expansion is deliberate strategy. Forward P/E 22.07x, PEG 1.28, Short Interest 6.44%.
howTheyMakeMoney: E-commerce (Shopee): #1 Southeast Asia marketplace — GMV fees, advertising, logistics (~64% revenue)
Fintech (SeaMoney): SPayLater, SeaBank — lending, payments, insurance (~21% revenue)
Gaming (Garena): Free Fire — global battle royale, in-game purchases (~15% revenue)

keyMetrics.name: P/E Ratio
keyMetrics.interpretation: Reasonable after profitability turnaround. Undervalued relative to growth.

keyMetrics.name: Forward P/E
keyMetrics.interpretation: Based on FY2026 EPS $3.90. PEG 1.28 fair for growth.

keyMetrics.name: Revenue Growth (YoY)
keyMetrics.interpretation: High growth continues. Shopee GMV +25% guidance additional.

keyMetrics.name: Operating Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: Logistics reinvestment pressuring margins. Short-term pain, long-term moat.

keyMetrics.name: Gross Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: Solid among e-commerce companies. Platform fee model.

keyMetrics.name: FCF
keyMetrics.interpretation: FCF margin 19.66%. Strong cash generation ability.

keyMetrics.name: Short Interest
keyMetrics.interpretation: Elevated short interest. 18.98M shares, increasing from prior month.

growthDrivers.description: Simply Wall St (3/13): Post-decline valuation check. Revenue +36%, FCF $4.5B, Forward P/E 22x — price not reflecting fundamentals.

growthDrivers.title: Shopee AI Livestream Commerce Test — NBA Star Partnership
growthDrivers.description: Simply Wall St (3/7): Shopee testing AI livestream commerce with NBA All-Star Metta World Peace. Weapon against TikTok Shop.

growthDrivers.title: Logistics & Brazil Reinvestment — 2x Fulfillment Expansion + VIP Program
growthDrivers.description: Simply Wall St (3/9): Shopee GMV +25% guidance + 2x fulfillment network expansion + VIP program Brazil launch. Deliberate margin sacrifice for long-term competitiveness.

growthDrivers.title: FY2025 Net Income +255% — Dramatic Profitability Improvement
growthDrivers.description: Net income $1.58B (vs FY2024 $0.44B, +255%). Completed transition from losses to major profitability.

competitiveAdvantage.summary: Southeast Asia's largest e-commerce (Shopee) + fintech (SeaMoney) + gaming (Garena) triple ecosystem. 'Amazon of the East' positioning.

moats.description: Shopee leads in GMV across Southeast Asia. Self-built logistics network.
700M Southeast Asian population, Latin America expansion. Young digital-native market.

competitors.detail: Social commerce offensive. Rapidly penetrating Southeast Asia

analystOpinions.notableComment: 11 analysts Strong Buy consensus. Investing.com $144.65 (+68%), Seeking Alpha $136 (+58%). Barclays $120 cut yet Buy maintained. No sell ratings. Short Interest 6.44% notable.

risks.title: Logistics Cost +43% Surge — Margin Pressure Continues
risks.description: 2x fulfillment expansion investment driving cost surge. Short-term profitability damaged. Time needed for investment payback.

risks.title: Near 52-Week Low — YTD -32% Technical Weakness
risks.description: $86 is 11% above 52-week low $77.05. RSI 31 oversold. Short Interest 6.44% elevated.

risks.title: Analyst Targets Slashed — Barclays $226→$120
risks.description: Major IB target cuts deteriorating market sentiment. TD Cowen $138→$100.

risks.title: TikTok Shop Competition Intensifying
risks.description: Social commerce reshaping Southeast Asian e-commerce landscape. Shopee GMV share threatened.

risks.title: Share Dilution +5.54% YoY
risks.description: Annual 5.54% share dilution. Per-share value erosion risk.

buyReasons.title: Forward P/E 22x + RSI 31 Oversold — Bottom-Fishing Opportunity
buyReasons.rationale: +36% growth at Forward P/E 22x. RSI oversold + near 52-week low. Contrarian buying setup.

buyReasons.title: FY2025 Net Income +255% — Profitability Turnaround Confirmed
buyReasons.rationale: From losses to $1.58B profit. FCF $4.51B. Sustainable business model proven.

buyReasons.title: Net Cash $7.24B — Ample Crisis Buffer
buyReasons.rationale: Net cash $12.29/share (14% of stock price). Financial safety margin secured.

buyReasons.title: All 11 Analysts Buy/Strong Buy — Consensus $145 (+68%)
buyReasons.rationale: Zero sell ratings among covering analysts. Long-term growth conviction.

overallOpinion: Sea Limited at $86.00 is near its 52-week low with RSI 31 oversold — a textbook contrarian buying setup.
FY2025 net income +255%, FCF $4.51B, Forward P/E 22x — fundamentals are solid.
YTD -32% decline reflects logistics cost surge + target cuts. However, this is deliberate reinvestment.
All 11 analysts Buy, Seeking Alpha Strong Buy $136 — gap between market price and analyst value is maximized.
Watch for short-covering rally (6.44% short interest). Mid-to-long-term buy thesis valid despite near-term volatility.

investmentVerdict.summary: RSI 31 oversold + Forward P/E 22x + all analysts Buy. Logistics reinvestment short-term pain for long-term moat. Contrarian buying opportunity.
